name: Portal
description: Arched doorways topped with a semicircle, the openings re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 14%; bottom: 0; width: 72%; height: 88%; border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
